NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE HELD ON JAN-24-2025 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 304. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER. BASED ON THE CMC STATEMENT ON FILE AND DETAILED DISCUSSION WITH THE PARTIES, THE PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN FEB-7-2025 (OR, IN THE EVENT THE PARTIES ARE ABLE TO REACH AN AGREEMEENT, A STIPULATION AND PROPOSED ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF LEAVE TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT). THE NEXT CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE HELD CONCURRENTLY WITH THE HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION. JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK ED SANTOS; DEPT 304.
